controlRecord.name: CR Current Account Facility Instance Record

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: A unique reference to an item or an occurrence of Current Account Facility

attributes.name: CurrentAccountIdentification
attributes.description:
Unique identifier for the customer’s current account in the bank’s system. (Customer Product View)
Internal reference linking product to the agreement. (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountBankReference
attributes.description: Reference to a party who is Current Account Servicer or Bank

attributes.name: CurrentAccountName
attributes.description:
Name of Account Holder. (Customer Product View)
Official account title as per agreement (can include joint names). (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountCurrency
attributes.description:
The currency in which a customers current account is maintained.. (Customer Product View)
Defined in the product terms (multi-currency accounts possible). (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountAvailableBalance
attributes.description:
Funds available for immediate withdrawal/spending. (Customer Product View)
Balance subject to terms (may exclude uncleared deposits). (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountCurrentBalance
attributes.description:
Actual balance, including uncleared transactions. (Customer Product View)
Balance the bank legally records at a point in time. (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountStatus
attributes.description:
Status shown to customer: ACTIVE, FROZEN, CLOSED, DORMANT. (Customer Product View)
Contract status managed by bank (open, terminated, suspended). (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountOpenDate
attributes.description:
Date account became active. (Customer Product View)
Start date of the contract. (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountCloseDate
attributes.description:
Date account was closed (if applicable). (Customer Product View)
Termination/closure date of agreement. (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountCustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to a Party who is Current Account Holder or Customer

attributes.name: CurrentAccountArrangement
attributes.description:
Usually not visible in day-to-day banking. (Customer Product View)
Full legal contract governing account operation. (Bank Agreement View)

attributes.name: CurrentAccountType
attributes.description: Defines if its checking/current, savings, business, premium, etc.

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentificationIssuerReference
attributes.description: Reference to a Party that assigns the identification.

serviceOperations.name: Initiate Current Account Facility Instance Record
Update Current Account Facility Instance Record
Exchange Current Account Facility Instance Record
Execute Current Account Facility Instance Record
Capture Current Account Facility Instance Record
Request Current Account Facility Instance Record
Retrieve Current Account Facility Instance Record
Notify Current Account Facility Instance Record

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Amount Block Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Amount Block arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Amount Block service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: AmountBlockInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the customer who owns the account where the money is blocked.

attributes.name: BankReference
attributes.description: Reference to the bank that applies and manages the money block.

attributes.name: AmountBlockType
attributes.description: The general category of a block applied to funds in an account, indicating the overall purpose or nature of the restriction

attributes.name: AmountBlockReason
attributes.description: Reason for placing the block (e.g., card transaction, loan security).

attributes.name: ExecutedBlockAmount
attributes.description: Current reserved amount

attributes.name: AmountBlockStatus
attributes.description: Current state of Amount Block Lifecycle

attributes.name: AmountBlockStartDate
attributes.description: Date when the block becomes effective.

attributes.name: AmountBlockEndDate
attributes.description: Date the block is scheduled to end

attributes.name: AmountBlockReleaseDate
attributes.description: Actual date when funds are released.

attributes.name: ReleasedAmount
attributes.description: Amount already freed from block.

attributes.name: OutstandingBlockedAmount
attributes.description: Remaining amount still under restriction.

attributes.name: SourceAccountIdentification
attributes.description: The bank account number (or IBAN) of the customer where amount will be blocked.

attributes.name: CustomerName
attributes.description: The name of the customer

attributes.name: AmountBlockReleaseType
attributes.description: Defines how and under what condition a blocked (held) amount is made available again on an account.

attributes.name: AmountBlockScopeType
attributes.description: Defines how much of the funds are restricted and how broadly the block applies.

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Payment Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the outbound payment arrangements, the instructional content of invoked payment service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to authorized party with ability to initiate payments from the source account

attributes.name: PayeeReference
attributes.description: Reference to a party that receives an amount of money from the debtor.

attributes.name: PayeeName
attributes.description: The name of the recipient of the payment.

attributes.name: PayeeAccount
attributes.description: The bank account number (or IBAN) of the payee where funds will be deposited.

attributes.name: PaymentAmountandCurrency
attributes.description:
The monetary value to be transferred from the customers current account to the payee

Payment Amount and Currency refers to the monetary value of a payment and the specific currency in which it is denominated.

- Payment Amount  the numeric value of the transaction being transferred.

- Currency (CCY)  the 3-letter ISO code that specifies the type of money (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) in which the amount is expressed.

attributes.name: PaymentExecutionDate
attributes.description: The immediate or future date on which the payment should be executed.

attributes.name: PaymentFrequency
attributes.description: The interval at which the payment repeats.

attributes.name: PaymentEndDate
attributes.description: The date until which the recurrence should continue.

attributes.name: PaymentStatus
attributes.description: WHERE the payment currently is in its lifecycle (scheduled, processing, completed, failed).

attributes.name: PayeeBankReference
attributes.description: Reference to a financial institution servicing an account for the payee.

attributes.name: PaymentMethod
attributes.description:
Describes the channel or mechanism by which money is transferred from the customers current account to the payee.

BANK_TRANSFER": Direct transfer between bank accounts (ACH, SEPA, RTGS, NEFT, etc.).
"STANDING_ORDER": Automated recurring transfer (e.g., rent, subscriptions).
"DIRECT_DEBIT" : Payment initiated by the payee, but authorized by the customer.
"CHEQUE": Payment executed via cheque issuance (less common in APIs).

attributes.name: PaymentDescription
attributes.description: A narrative or description attached to the payment.

attributes.name: PaymentSchedule
attributes.description: Processing schedule for repeating payments for standing orders (e.g. start date, end, period, number/cycles). Note this triggers an internal execution call as necessary.

attributes.name: InstructedPaymentReference
attributes.description: Reference to the instructed payment

attributes.name: ExecutedPaymentReference
attributes.description: Reference to the executed payment

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to <CR>

attributes.name: PaymentInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to Payment

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Interest Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Interest arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Interest service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to <CR>

attributes.name: InterestInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to Interest

attributes.name: InterestRate
attributes.description: The rate used to calculate interest, either as a fixed value or derived from a base rate plus a margin.

attributes.name: InterestType
attributes.description: The type of interest (to be applied or applied)

attributes.name: InterestStatus
attributes.description: Represents the stage of the billing process/lifecycle.

attributes.name: InterestAccrualMethodType
attributes.description: Identifies the computation method of accrued interest of the related financial instrument. (ISO20022)

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the customer to whom the interest relates, either as the recipient (for earned interest) or the payer (for charged interest).

attributes.name: SourceAccountIdentification
attributes.description: The bank account number (or IBAN) of the customer account on which the interest is calculated, applied, or settled.

attributes.name: CustomerName
attributes.description: The name of the individual or entity that owns the account associated with the interest.

attributes.name: BankReference
attributes.description: Reference to the financial institution servicing the customer account and responsible for calculating, applying, or processing the interest.

attributes.name: InterestBaseAmount
attributes.description: The underlying amount on which interest is calculated.

attributes.name: ExecutedInterestAmount
attributes.description:
Amount of money representing interest payments. (ISO20022)

Comment:
Interest amount posted to the account or invoice

attributes.name: AccruedInterestAmount
attributes.description: Interest accumulated but not yet applied.

attributes.name: InterestCalculationMethodType
attributes.description: Method used to compute interest (simple, compound).

attributes.name: InterestPaymentFrequency
attributes.description: Specifies the frequency of an interest payment. (ISO20022)

attributes.name: InterestPaymentSchedule
attributes.description: Interest payment schedule is a plan that defines when interest is calculated and paid, at what rate, and for which periods.

attributes.name: OutstandingInterestAmount
attributes.description: Remaining unpaid interest amount

attributes.name: PaidInterestAmount
attributes.description: Interest mount already settled

attributes.name: InterestPaymentDate
attributes.description: Date interest is actually paid to or collected from the customer.

attributes.name: InterestAccrualPeriod
attributes.description: Time period over which interest is earned

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Sweep Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Sweep arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Sweep service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: SweepInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: The person or entity that owns the account from which funds are swept (debited).

attributes.name: SourceBankReference
attributes.description: The bank that holds the source account and transfers funds out during the sweep.

attributes.name: SourceAccountIdentification
attributes.description: Account from which funds are swept (may be the same as the customer).

attributes.name: BeneficiaryAccountIdentification
attributes.description: Account receiving the swept funds (may be the same as the customer or a related party).

attributes.name: SweepType
attributes.description: Sweep type defines the purpose and nature of the sweep, i.e., how and why funds are moved between accounts.

attributes.name: SweepExecutionDate
attributes.description: Date the actual transfer between accounts happens.

attributes.name: SweepStatus
attributes.description: Current state of Sweep Lifecycle

attributes.name: SweepCurrency
attributes.description: Currency for the sweep.

attributes.name: SweepFrequency
attributes.description: Sweep frequency defines how often the sweep action is executed. It determines the timing of automatic transfers between accounts.

attributes.name: ExecutedSweepAmount
attributes.description: Amount successfully moved

attributes.name: RemainingSourceBalance
attributes.description: Balance left in source account

attributes.name: SweepMandate
attributes.description: Permission to define a sweep arrangement to the target account.

attributes.name: BeneficiaryReference
attributes.description: The person or entity that owns the account receiving the swept funds (credited).

attributes.name: BeneficiaryBankReference
attributes.description: The bank that holds the target account and receives the swept funds.

attributes.name: CustomerName
attributes.description: Name of Customer

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Charge Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Charge arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Charged service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the charge record instance within the system.

attributes.name: ChargeInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Identifier assigned to a specific charge instance for tracking purposes.

attributes.name: ChargeType
attributes.description: Type of charge to be applied, e.g. Opening charge, Periodical charge, Early termination charge, etc.

attributes.name: ChargeRate
attributes.description: The rate or percentage applied to derive the charge amount

attributes.name: ChargeBearerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the party contractually responsible for settling the charge

attributes.name: ChargeDebitAccount
attributes.description: The rate or percentage applied to derive the charge amount

attributes.name: ChargeCreditAccount
attributes.description: Account to which the charge amount is credited

attributes.name: ChargeBaseAmount
attributes.description: Monetary value of the charge applied

attributes.name: AccrualChargeAmount
attributes.description: Accumulated charge amount over a defined accrual period

attributes.name: ChargeRecipientReference
attributes.description: Reference to the party entitled to receive the charge amount

attributes.name: ChargeCalculationMethod
attributes.description: Description of the logic or formula used to compute the charge

attributes.name: ChargeCalculationMethodType
attributes.description: Standardized classification of the calculation basis (e.g., flat, tiered, percentage)

attributes.name: ChargePaymentMethod
attributes.description: Description of the mechanism used to settle the charge

attributes.name: ChargePaymentMethodType
attributes.description: Standardized classification of the payment mechanism

attributes.name: ChargeApplicationFrequency
attributes.description: Frequency at which the charge is applied (e.g., monthly, annually)

attributes.name: ChargeBearerType
attributes.description: Specifies how the charge liability is distributed between involved parties

attributes.name: AccruedCreditDebitIndicator
attributes.description: Indicator specifying whether the accrued charge is a debit or credit entry

attributes.name: ChargeApplicationAmount
attributes.description: Amount applied during a specific charge event

attributes.name: ChargeApplicationCreditDebitIndicator
attributes.description: Indicator specifying whether the applied charge is a debit or credit

attributes.name: ChargeApplicationDate
attributes.description: Date and time at which the charge is applied

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Status Tracking Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Status Tracking arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Status Tracking service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: StatusTrackingInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: StatusTrackingType
attributes.description: Classifies the category of status being monitored or maintained for the subject entity. Defines the business context of the tracking activity such as lifecycle, balance, workflow progression, limit utilization, settlement, fulfillment, compliance, or exception status.

attributes.name: Status
attributes.description: Represents the current state, condition, or standing of the tracked entity within the specified tracking type. Expresses the latest recognized business or operational status value.

attributes.name: StatusReason
attributes.description: Specifies the business rationale, event, rule, condition, or triggering circumstance that caused the current status to be assigned, changed, suspended, escalated, or terminated.

attributes.name: StatusDateandTime
attributes.description: Indicates the date and time at which the status became effective, was recorded, or was last updated within the tracking process.

attributes.name: StatusOrigin
attributes.description: Identifies the originating source, process, system, channel, service operation, event stream, or organizational party responsible for generating or updating the status.

attributes.name: StatusSequence
attributes.description: Defines the relative ordering, progression index, or chronological position of the status within a lifecycle, workflow, state transition chain, or event history.

attributes.name: StatusThreshold
attributes.description: Specifies a reference limit, tolerance, trigger point, boundary condition, or evaluation criterion used to determine status transitions, alerts, escalations, or exception conditions.

attributes.name: StatusValue
attributes.description: Captures the measurable, calculated, observed, or evaluated value associated with the tracked status condition. Typically used for quantitative tracking such as balances, amounts, utilization percentages, durations, or counts.

attributes.name: StatusUnit
attributes.description: Defines the unit of measure, denomination, scale, or representation applicable to the associated status value, such as currency, percentage, quantity, duration, or measurement unit.

attributes.name: EffectivePeriod
attributes.description: Defines the time interval during which the status is considered valid, applicable, enforceable, or operationally active for business processing or reporting purposes.

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Deposit Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Deposit arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Deposit service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: CurrentAccountFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to <CR>

attributes.name: DepositInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to the Deposit instance.

attributes.name: DepositIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the deposit arrangement.

attributes.name: DepositType
attributes.description: Specifies the type of deposit (e.g., current, term, recurring).

attributes.name: DepositLifecycleStatus
attributes.description: Identifies the current stage or status of the deposit arrangement across its lifecycle.

attributes.name: DepositExecutionDate
attributes.description: The date on which a deposit transaction is formally carried out and becomes effective in the system or agreement.

attributes.name: DepositValueDate
attributes.description: The date from which a deposited amount is considered effective for interest calculation and account balance purposes.

attributes.name: DepositAmount
attributes.description: Specifies the initial or agreed amount of funds associated with the deposit arrangement.

attributes.name: DepositInterest
attributes.description: Reference to the interest arrangement applicable to the deposit arrangement, including the interest rate, calculation method, and payment terms.

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the customer associated with the deposit arrangement.

attributes.name: BankReference
attributes.description: Reference to the financial institution responsible for managing the deposit arrangement.

attributes.name: DepositDebitAccount
attributes.description: Reference to the account from which funds are debited as part of the deposit arrangement.

attributes.name: DepositCreditAccount
attributes.description: Reference to the account to which deposited funds are credited as part of the deposit arrangement.
